use_cases: Displays active filter selections with optional remove functionality
Shows selected filter criteria with label-value pairs in data tables
Indicates current filtering state in dashboards and search interfaces
Provides quick removal of applied filters with close button interaction
Supports avatar variant for user-based or entity-based filtering contexts
ai_summary: A minimalist filter badge component for displaying active filter selections in data-driven interfaces. Supports three variants (default, pill, avatar) with Tremor design system styling and built-in remove functionality. Designed for SaaS dashboards, e-commerce filtering, and any application requiring clear filter state indication with quick removal capability.
